goal: Use the accessible locked v0 Phi model as an alternative strict-cache path for final Docker runtime evidence: materialize or prove inability to materialize microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct strict cache outside the repo, then if cache succeeds create Phi-based exported Docker runtime evidence with read-only MIB_MODEL_CACHE_DIR and native/OpenAI-compatible endpoint transcripts. Do not change product code, do not fake cache files, do not bundle base-model weights, and do not claim M6-RC GO until endpoint evidence actually passes.
head: 57353ef
blocked_scope: Runtime, loader, verifier, schema, API, DB, worker, FE, or benchmark changes
Bundling base-model weights in git, export artifacts, or Docker image
Creating fake strict-cache files or weakening hash/size validation
M6-RC GO/sign-off changes before endpoint transcripts pass
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may write large Phi model files only outside the repo under /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi. Repo edits are limited to evidence and operational handoff files.
required_evidence: Phi catalog-required cache_subdir and required file list
Network HEAD result for pinned Phi config
Phi cache materialization command result with strict hash/size verification or concrete failure
If Phi cache succeeds, exported Docker image build/save evidence for a Phi CUDA/lora_adapter package
If Phi cache succeeds, Docker run with read-only MIB_MODEL_CACHE_DIR mount
If Phi cache succeeds, HTTP transcript for /healthz
If Phi cache succeeds, HTTP transcript for /agents/{agent_id}/run
If Phi cache succeeds, HTTP transcript for /v1/chat/completions
If endpoint evidence fails after strict cache succeeds, concrete next blocker
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=. MIB_OFFLINE=1 ./.venv/bin/python -c '<ensure_model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct cuda runtime_evidence>'

docker run -d --name mib-phi-evidence-989c -p 127.0.0.1:18082:8000 -v /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache:/models:ro -e MIB_MODEL_CACHE_DIR=/models -e MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND=1 -e MIB_RUNTIME_BEARER_TOKEN=<redacted> mib-export-989c1bbe5246469a8a9839cf4c5340ef:latest
warnings: Phi cache files are large and remain outside git under /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi.
This evidence gate does not change product code and does not make M6-RC GO unless endpoint evidence actually passes.
Endpoint evidence used MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND=1 because the fixture adapter is not a real trained adapter.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped Phi strict-cache/runtime evidence gate after Gemma was blocked by gated unauthenticated access.
phase_notes.audit: Focused read completed for Phi strict catalog, cache service, package/export fixture path, and runtime behavior.
phase_notes.build: Materialized Phi strict cache under /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi, built Phi Docker export image, scanned image artifact, and captured Docker endpoint transcripts with read-only cache mount.
phase_notes.check: Strict cache, image scan, /healthz, native endpoint, OpenAI-compatible endpoint, and read-only mount evidence passed with fixture adapter fake backend enabled.
phase_notes.done: Evidence recorded in artifacts/review/phi_strict_cache_runtime_evidence.md. M6-RC remains NOT_GO pending real trained adapter inference evidence or explicit release-policy acceptance.

pabcd.approved_scope: Phi strict cache materialization evidence, Phi exported Docker runtime endpoint evidence if cache succeeds, and operational docs/artifacts.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no fake cache, no bundled model weights, no release GO changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
